course_title: History of the United States, Since 1877
campus: distance learning (online) experiences. Students in a hybrid-flexible course section may choose to participate using face-to-face methods, online methods, or a combination of both methods based on preference. To access your course on the first day of class go to https://cfk.instructure.com. Your username for online learning at CFK will be your first and last name separated by a period, your password will be the same one that you use to access your CFK email account.
